meaning: adj.永恒的,永远的,不灭的,没完没了的
examples: He has the upbeat manner of an eternal optimist.
Allow me to embrace you as a sign of my eternal gratitude.
You also get 100, 000 rift crystals, the aforementioned eternal ferry stone, and the Gransys Armor pack.
Probably the eternal hope that one of those TiVo competitors will just buy the company outright.
